leadText: Surge Surfer (Japanese: サーフテール Surf Tail) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Alolan Raichu.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When the battlefield is under the effects of Electric Terrain , Surge Surfer doubles the Speed of Pokémon with this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Surge Surfer has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] When the battlefield is under the effects of Electric Terrain , Surge Surfer doubles the Speed of Pokémon with this Ability.
